title: Day 16 — Platform Integration
guidingQuestion: How will I make my venture work in the real world?
learningObjectives: Celebrate Weeks 1–3 venture artifacts and name what is still missing before launch
Frame Week 4 as Blueprint Week — evolving the venture, not replacing it
Explain platform integration: your venture + AIA platform + business engine = scalable enterprise
Update Venture Blueprint Business Model and Revenue Model sections
Extend the FEC from customer discovery (Week 3) to platform, revenue engine, and agency growth (Week 4)
expectedOutputs: Venture Blueprint — Business Model and Revenue Model sections updated
FEC Week 4 integration — Platform Integration, Revenue Engine, Agency Growth Strategy
Platform integration narrative in Venture Portfolio
